text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I stretch for five minutes, then I drink a glass of water and make my bed. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit. I leave for work at 8:00. My job as a graphic designer keeps me busy from 9 to 5, with a short lunch break in between. In the evening, I go for a 30-minute run or do yoga at home. Then I cook dinner, read for a while, and watch a TV show. I try to be in bed by 10:30. This routine keeps me healthy and productive. Consistency is key—it helps me feel balanced and in control of my day.
